mechanism: Fiscal dominance makes the central bank reaction function endogenous: the Fed cannot credibly commit to φ_π > 1.5 when rate hikes increase interest expense on $35T+ debt, potentially destabilizing the fiscal trajectory. This constrains the effective coefficient to ~1.0-1.2.
regime_dependence: Binding when debt/GDP is high enough that interest expense is a material share of the budget (current ~125% debt/GDP)
